expression.comment: A [ ... ] data-function expression as used in .gui files and localization. The meta.embedded scope resets VS Code's standard token type to 'other' even when the expression sits inside a double-quoted string, which is what makes quote auto-closing and native bracket-pair colorization work inside the brackets.
expression.name: meta.embedded.expression.paradox-datafunction

patterns.comment: String argument: 'localize_key' or '(int32)3'. May itself contain a bracketed expression; the begin/end machinery keeps the ] inside the quotes from ending the outer expression.
patterns.name: string.quoted.single.paradox-datafunction

patterns.comment: Format suffix before the closing bracket: [x.GetName|U], [GetValue|2=%.0f]
patterns.name: constant.other.formatting.paradox-datafunction

patterns.comment: Function call name (segment directly before an opening paren)
patterns.name: entity.name.function.paradox-datafunction

patterns.comment: Plain chain segment: a data type, promote or function (Character, GetPlayer, IsAlive)
patterns.name: support.function.datafunction.paradox-datafunction
